      "question": "What is the primary function of a Distributed File System?",
      "options": ["A) To provide a single point of access to files", "B) To store and manage large amounts of data across a network", "C) To provide a secure environment for file sharing", "D) To manage file backups"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "A Distributed File System is designed to store and manage large amounts of data across a network, making it accessible to multiple use
